title: phlomoides admirabilis
intro: Phlomoides admirabilis, also known as Lycopsis italica or Italian bugloss, is a flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phlomoides admirabilis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and treating digestive issues. Phlomoides admirabilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in topical applications, such as creams and salves.
